title: Get Property Values
content:
# Get Property Values

Fetch property values belonging to a particular property definition.

## Endpoint

`GET /properties/{property_name}/values/get`

code_examples.code:
from kelvin.api import Client

client = Client(api_key="your-api-key")
response = client.properties.getPropertyValues()
print(response)

parameters.name: property_name
parameters.description: Property `name` for which the values are to be fetched. The string can only contain lowercase alphanumeric characters and `.`, `_` or `-` characters.

parameters.name: resource_type
parameters.description: Array of resource types to filter the list of Property values returned.

resource_values.description: List of resources and their current corresponding values for the `property_name`.
